name: active-flow each push entry includes the pid timestamp and flow name fields
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-push.sh" --flow plan-feature --pid 1234 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && node -e "const o=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack','utf8').trim());if(o.pid!==1234||!o.flow||!o.pushed_at)process.exit(1);" && echo ok 1>&2
